metadata_description: Easily book your online session for tarot card readings, coffee cup readings, and detailed natal chart interpretations.
footer_desc: We provide intuitive and professional reading services to help you uncover the mysteries of your future and illuminate your path under the guidance of the stars.
greeting: Welcome to the Mystic Booking System
hero_desc: Discover the answers to life's questions through the mystical symbols of Tarot cards and the ancient cosmic guidance of your astrological birth chart.
booking_subtitle: Book your session in a few easy steps, and tune in to the whispers of the cards and the sky.
placeholder_notes: e.g. Uncertainty in relationships, career decisions, or any specific question you'd like to ask before the reading...
service_tarot_desc: Classic 7 card spread analyzing your general path and life events.
service_palm_desc: Interpretation of palm lines representing fate and vital energy.
service_coffee_desc: Intuitive reading based on traditional coffee cup patterns.
service_astrology_desc: Full analysis of cosmic planetary alignments based on birth info.
service_detailed_tarot_desc: In-depth tarot analysis combined with planetary influences.
success_desc: Your booking for mystic counseling has been successfully submitted. We will contact you shortly before the session.
select_date_prompt: Please select a date from the calendar on the left.
error_network: A connection error occurred. Please check your internet connection.
no_slots_found: No available slots found for the selected date.
validation_name_min: Name must be at least 2 characters.
validation_email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address.
validation_phone_min: Phone number must be at least 10 digits.
validation_birthdate_required: Birth Date is required for astrology analysis.
validation_birthtime_required: Birth Time is required for astrology analysis.
validation_birthplace_required: Birth Place is required for astrology analysis.
error_slot_taken: The selected time slot is already booked for this date. Please choose another slot.
error_invalid_form: Form data is invalid or incomplete.
error_booking_failed: Failed to create appointment, system error.
